content.text:
Hey techfolks! 👩🏿‍💻👩🏽‍💻👩‍💻👨🏿‍💻👨🏽‍💻👨‍💻

What's your everyday real-life base OS? (Not counting VMs!)

Please RT for reach...  I want to hear from *everyone* in the hacker/coder/techie/datascience community 😎

(And if you have a sec pls comment with your specific version/distro!)

#QuickPoll
